description: Native app surfaces phase A4 (docs/design/native-app-surfaces.md): iOS contexts run through XCUITest preflight and either execute on capable macOS hosts or SKIP with actionable host/toolchain guidance. This group is intended for focused macOS workflow-dispatch validation from non-macOS development hosts.

tests.description: A5 remains gated: iOS mobile-browser contexts SKIP with the phase A5 message.
A4 app context: attempts to open Settings on iOS. On capable macOS hosts this can PASS; elsewhere it SKIPs with iOS/macOS toolchain guidance.
